description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: stage1 and stage2, using the default bash:latest Docker image and a cache keyed by CI_PROJECT_ID that stores android/.gradle/. Define a minify job in stage1 that runs "apk update", "apk add nodejs-npm", "npm install -g inliner", "cd public", and "cat index.html | inliner > ../index.min.html", and publishes index.min.html as an artifact. Add a firefox job in stage1 that creates the directories clavem/public and clavem/addon, copies manifest.json, copies public assets (crypto.js, script.js, launcher-icon-1x.png, launcher-icon-2x.png) into clavem/public, copies addon files (index.html, script.js, style.css) into clavem/addon, and stores the resulting clavem directory as a named artifact "clavem". Add a pages job in stage1 that runs only on the master branch, executes "echo \"Nothing to do...\"", and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Finally, add an android job in stage2 that uses the jangrewe/gitlab-ci-android image, moves index.min.html into android/app/src/main/assets/www/index.html, configures gradle.properties with JVM args and disables the daemon, runs "./gradlew assembleDebug", moves the generated app-debug.apk to the project root, and stores the APK as an artifact.
